title: phyllanthus cinereus
intro: Phyllanthus cinereus, also known as the grey leaf phyllanthus, is a type of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is widely used in traditional medicine, particularly in India and Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus cinereus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus cinereus include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including liver and kidney diseases.
